verdict_scope_note: PR #2313 (robots, hydrated SPA) PASSES its own scope 7/7; VCST-5108 overall still FAIL — PreRender does not deliver SEO-complete crawlable HTML to bots.

pr_under_test.title: feat(seo): set robots=index on indexable routes, keep noindex on private/auth pages (VCST-5108)

smoke_test.method: Googlebot UA curl, cache-bust forced-fresh renders (2026-06-03 later re-run)
smoke_test.A1_bot_prerender: FAIL (fresh PDP MISS = 132KB shell, no name/price/desc)
smoke_test.D1_title_desc_canonical: FAIL (PDP/PLP prerender shell title, no desc; canonical absent on EVERY page incl. hydrated)
smoke_test.D2_robots_sitemap: FAIL (robots.txt 200 & advertises /sitemap.xml, but /sitemap.xml=404; /sitemap/sitemap.xml=200 but self-referential, no product/category URLs)
smoke_test.D3_product_schema: FAIL (0 application/ld+json in prerender AND hydrated DOM; Rich Results = No items detected)

decisive_signal: Prerender CAN capture content+correct SEO: /catalog fresh MISS rendered real title+description+robots:index,follow+7 product anchors+15 prices. Same-build PDP/PLP fresh MISS captured only App.vue robots default + shell title -> async route content/SEO loses the snapshot race. Root cause = missing window.prerenderReady handshake (unchanged). Canonical + Product JSON-LD unimplemented everywhere.
key_findings: PR #2313 verified: route-aware robots works in hydrated SPA (PDP/PLP/catalog=index; cart/account/sign-in/404=noindex) 7/7 PASS

Bots still get noindex + chrome-only content: prerender snapshots pre-hydration with no window.prerenderReady; PR #2313 robots fix does not reach the prerendered HTML until prerenderReady lands + cache busts
Prerender content gap unchanged (no product name/price/description/cards in snapshot)
canonical + Product JSON-LD still absent (PR #2313 scoped them as follow-ups)
Sitemap not crawlable: /sitemap.xml 404; generated index at /sitemap/sitemap.xml but child <loc> 404
Catalog SeoInfo data gap: most products lack pageTitle/metaDescription
remaining_work: prerenderReady handshake (highest impact — fixes bot content + bot robots)
